title: Xtremeauto Soft Head Alloy Wheel Brush - Car Alloy Wheel Cleaner Brush Detailing Cleaning Brush, No Metal Non Scratch Rim Car Wheel Brush Perfect For Motorcycle, Cars & Bicycles (Orange
features: PROFESSIONAL GRADE QUALITY - Our car detailing brush is crafted to meet the rigorous standards of vehicle care professionals. Unlike plastic wheel cleaners that can splash and leave traces, our brush offers a superior cleaning experience. It's lint-free and ensures a spotless finish, enhancing the overall appearance of your rims.

PREMIUM SYNTHETIC WOOL CONSTRUCTION - The brush features super soft synthetic wool that generates ample foam to tackle dirt, oil, and even stubborn burnt brake dust. This material not only cleans effectively but also safeguards your car and rims from scratches, making car cleaning hassle-free.

EXTENDED REACH HANDLE - With a total length of 40 cm, the extra-long handle of our car wash brush makes cleaning deep rim beds and aluminium rims a breeze. It's soft enough to prevent any damage to painted wheels, giving you peace of mind while achieving a sparkling finish.

UNMATCHED VERSATILITY - Our wheel brush is engineered with improved polypropylene fibers that are suitable for all types of wheels. No longer will tight clearances and complex spoke designs be a challenge. It effortlessly navigates high-performance brakes and reaches difficult-to-access areas around wheels, fenders, and more.

MULTI PURPOSE CLEANING - This wheel cleaner brush isn't just for rims. It's perfect for cleaning cars, trucks, motorcycles, bicycles, RVs, boats, grills, engine compartments, exhaust pipes, bumpers, vents, and various other surfaces. Cleaning up after use is a breeze – simply rinse with soap and water and let it air dry.
description: Product Description Revolutionize Your Car Care Routine with the Xtremeauto Wheel Brush – Unleash the Power of Clean! Versatile Cleaning Marvel: A car wheel brush, tire cleaner, rim detail brush, and microfiber tire brush all in one. Soft microfiber bristles for scratch-free cleaning. Gentle Microfiber Magic: Super-soft microfiber faux wool bristles for a delicate touch. Protective covers and comfortable handles ensure safe interior cleaning. All-Round Cleaning Power: Effectively removes tough residues without scratches. Ideal for various surfaces, from car floors to household tile joints.
